# Epic: The Self-Healing Protocol

### Goal
Provide a native mechanism for the Agent OS to autonomously eliminate Codebase Debt (`[DOC_GAP]`, `[TEST_GAP]`, `[GUIDE_GAP]`) mathematically generated by `DreamService`. This entirely deprecates the concept of "Standing GitHub Epics" and prevents Issue Tracker pollution by natively looping deterministic validation directly back into an autonomous Librarian Sub-Agent cycle.

### Sub-Issues
- DreamService / Librarian Coupling
- Native Sub-Agent Delegation (Librarian Node)
